meaning: n.崇拜,礼拜,尊敬vi.敬神,拜神vt.崇拜,尊敬
examples: He prefers to worship in his own home.
Singer Brett Anderson inspires old-fashioned hero worship.
Lombardi said the Pope believes religious freedom in Cuba means more than the ability to worship freely.
So out the door went Verna, starry-eyed with hero worship, wobbling on her first high heels.
